description:
Deed of acknowledgment (iqrār). In Arabic script. The muqirr is ʿAbdallāh b. Muḥammad al-M[...]ī. The content is unclear. Seems to be a deed of sale for livestock (al-baqar al-mubtāʿ), somehow related to the government (... al-sulṭāniyya bi-l-nāḥiya); the description of the animal follows. The bottom is missing. Needs further examination.

Reused for business accounts in Arabic script, mentioning items such as tutty and gallnuts.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
